# openai_user_role (Resource)

Manage an organization-level role assignment for a user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_user_role" "example" {
  user_id = "user_123"
  role_id = "role_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) role id
- `user_id` (String) user id
